title: eriosema verdickii var. schoutedenianum
intro: Eriosema verdickii var. schoutedenianum, also known as the Schouteden's kidney bean, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eriosema verdickii var. schoutedenianum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce oxidative stress and improve overall well-being. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a poultice or salve to apply topically to affected areas.
